## Objective

Describe the concrete engineering or research objective.

## Boundaries

- [ ] Authored source changed
- [ ] Engine semantics changed
- [ ] Data contract changed
- [ ] Generated evidence changed
- [ ] Historical evidence preserved

## Methodology

- [ ] No lookahead introduced
- [ ] Costs and fill assumptions remain explicit
- [ ] Locked holdout was not used for tuning
- [ ] Rescue authorization and lineage are recorded where applicable

## Verification

List exact tests, preflight commands, and generated audits.
